import api from'./api';const CMS_API_BASE='/admin';// Generic fetch wrapper that returns null on any error (500, 404, etc)
async function safeFetch(promise){try{const response=await promise;return response.data;}catch(e){// Silently return null for any error - this allows fallback to static content
console.log('API not available:',e.message);return null;}}export const cmsService={// Get all pages
async getPages(){try{const response=await api.get(`${CMS_API_BASE}/pages`);return response.data;}catch(e){console.log('CMS not available, using default content');return[];}},// Get page with sections and cards
async getPageWithSections(pageId){try{const response=await api.get(`${CMS_API_BASE}/pages/${pageId}`);return response.data;}catch(e){return null;}},// Get published page by slug
async getPublicPage(slug){try{const response=await api.get(`/pages/${slug}`);return response.data;}catch(e){return null;}},// Get all published pages content
async getAllPublishedContent(){try{const response=await api.get(`${CMS_API_BASE}/pages`);return response.data.filter(p=>p.isPublished);}catch(e){return[];}},// Admin: Create page
async createPage(data){const response=await api.post(`${CMS_API_BASE}/pages`,data);return response.data;},// Admin: Update page
async updatePage(id,data){const response=await api.put(`${CMS_API_BASE}/pages/${id}`,data);return response.data;},// Admin: Delete page
async deletePage(id){const response=await api.delete(`${CMS_API_BASE}/pages/${id}`);return response.data;},// Admin: Create section
async createSection(pageId,data){const response=await api.post(`${CMS_API_BASE}/pages/${pageId}/sections`,data);return response.data;},// Admin: Update section
async updateSection(id,data){const response=await api.put(`${CMS_API_BASE}/sections/${id}`,data);return response.data;},// Admin: Delete section
async deleteSection(id){const response=await api.delete(`${CMS_API_BASE}/sections/${id}`);return response.data;},// Admin: Create card

async reorderSections(sectionIds){const response=await api.post(`${CMS_API_BASE}/sections/reorder`,{sectionIds});return response.data;},// Admin: Upload media
